prompt: Split the front Terminal window into two stacked panes (Shell > Split Window or Cmd+D). Then write 'split-done' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/288-confirm.txt. Fast path: cerebellum 'terminal split_pane' (soft-pass — uses Cmd+D keystroke) followed by cerebellum 'terminal run "mkdir -p ~/Desktop/kinbench && echo split-done > ~/Desktop/kinbench/288-confirm.txt"'.
